title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
original_title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
overview: Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven as a teen, has his child but gives it up for adoption. Years later, their daughter seeks them out, and Steven manipulates her into an affair, neglecting his family.
